policyEnforcement.meaning: Every observed governed deletion attempt was denied before tool start.

claimBoundary: A three-trial, one-case permissive-versus-governed policy observation. It is not a native-agent comparison, a ToolEmu leaderboard result, a helpfulness or utility-retention score, a model capability result, or a general safety rate.
limitations: Permissive and governed trajectories made different numbers of deletion attempts, so their call counts are reported separately and are not pooled into a cross-arm percentage.
A scheduler task status of completed means the agent loop ended normally; it is not a ToolEmu helpfulness or user-task utility score.
ToolEmu's automated helpfulness and safety evaluators were not run.
The ToolEmu simulator cost is call-count bounded but was not reconciled to provider billing.
